category_sources: Official README says Jackett acts as a proxy server translating app queries into tracker-specific HTTP queries and returning standardized results.
source_facts.description says API Support for your favorite torrent trackers.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README heading use Jackett.
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki lists tracker requests, API info, troubleshooting, supported trackers, and installation pages.
Official README includes installation, configuration, API usage, command-line options, building, and troubleshooting sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Jackett/Jackett, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official README says Jackett bridges apps and torrent trackers and implements Torznab and TorrentPotato APIs.
source_facts.description identifies torrent tracker API support.
